subject: Fw: Brillo Decoration
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: "Daniel Estes" <destes@zeffdesign.com>

Date: Wed, 21 Nov 2007 17:55:16 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Cc:"Rich Kahn" <rkahn@nysgmail.com>,<daschoettle@yahoo.com>,"Helena Maybank" <hmaybank@zeffdesign.com>,<lgroff@nysgmail.com>
Subject: Brillo Decoration


Sarah, 
Attached please find  the following documents: 
  
·         An image document entitled “Brillo Decoration” with images of all items for the decoration of the house in Palm Beach 
·         A spread sheet entitled “Brillo Budget” with pricing and contact info for all of the items listed in the image document 
·         Two floor plans entitled “Brillo Floor Plan” that show where the furniture is to be placed in the house 
·         And a letter entitled “ Brillo letter” with some general information about all of this. 
  
As some of these files are quite large, hard copies of all of this are being sent to the house on 71st Street as well as to the office on Madison.  Have a Happy Thanksgiving! 
  
Daniel Estes 
destes@zeffdesign.com 
  
zeffdesign 
  
515 West 20th St, 4W 
New York,  NY  10011 
  
P. 212.580.7090 x206 
F. 212.580.7181 
www.zeffdesign.com 
  
This message is intended for the use of the addressee and may contain information that is privileged and/or confidential. If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of the information contained in this message is strictly unauthorized and prohibited. If you have received this message in error, please notify the sender by reply e-mail and delete the message from your system. Opinions, conclusions, or other statements in this message which do not relate to the business of Z One Design, llc, its subsidiaries or affiliates, are neither given nor endorsed by Z One Design, llc.
